Prompt 1 (June 24): Research the 5 most costly discontinued pre launch projects by fortune 500 companies and 3 key reasons for cancellation. Write a strategy to ensure one of them is successfully relaunched.

Prompt 2 (June 25): Identify 5 ideas fortune 500 companies are accused of stealing and 3 key claims to the law suit. Develop a 5 point strategy to ensure one of the products wins any law suit regarding theft of concept.

Prompt 3 (June 26): Research 5 companies known for top quality customer satisfaction and find 3 key aspects responsible for the success. Develop a 5 point strategy to improve customer satisfaction for any company lagging.

Prompt 4 (June 27): Research the 5 top content creators among Fortune 500 CEOs and 3 key differences from non-content creators. Develop a 5 point strategy to grow your brand greater than the top content creators.
Prompt 5 (June 28): Research 5 top selling products from Kanye West and key sources of inspiration. Develop a strategy to ensure products in your line have remarkable design.
Prompt 6 (June 29): Research the 5 athletes with most Olympic gold medals and key attributes common among them. Develop a strategy to ensure products shipped by your line are winning products.

Prompt 7 (June 30): Research top 5 products from fortune 500 companies that have shown great prelaunch demand and 3 key causes. Describe how you would launch a product to ensure great prelaunch demand.
